So what is a database and database is made up of two separate pieces.

I would define whether my data is going to be in a tabular format or what not, and then I would restore my data in something that's called database.

So these softwares are called database management systems or we call them BBMS softwares.

What we are doing with the DBMS software systems is that we have reliable storage.
If there is any failure in the system, if your data wipe start for whatever reason, there is a backup in the database management system that can backup your system.

There are other considerations that we can do the compute in the using the dbms that sit somewhere in the cloud or on some kind of server as opposed to our own computers.

If you want to ask it to sort the data, if you want to ask it to randomize the data, if any kind of processing that you want to do, the DBMS decides based on the structure of your data, how you can do that more efficiently.
